chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 511 - وَ لَمَّا قُبِضَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ اَلْعَسْكَرِيُّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رُئِيَ اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَدْ خَرَجَ مِنَ اَلدَّارِ وَ قَدْ شُقَّ قَمِيصُهُ مِنْ خَلْفٍ وَ قُدَّامٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.511 - "When Imam Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Hadi (as) passed away, Imam Hasan ibn Ali Al-Askari (as), was seen coming out of the house with his shirt torn from the front and the back."
